sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 43

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 43:1
items.html: (to the question) For the Gevurot, when they are in the secret of the Zivug [coupling], are more important than the males, in the secret of the verse "a woman of valor is the crown of her husband," for the Hassadim are magnified through the Gevurot. Therefore the Gevurot are called by the name Atara [crown], after "the crown of her husband"; and the Hassadim that receive their crown are also called by this name. (p. 759, Item 40; p. 761, Item 42)
